batch_summary.note: Jul-Aug 2023. S-003: Olivia reports a device with 'green light and smoke coming out' in Eli's household (Jul 30, 2023) — early vaping device reference, 2 years before the B-026 weaponization event. Olivia has documented asthma concerns (confirmed in B-009 ROW-3251 context). This is the EARLIEST vaping/smoke signal — at this stage it appears as a genuine Sent-direction safety observation relayed through Olivia. ARC-RF14-002 first signal: arc promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING.

primary_flags.description: ROW-3139 [Sent]: 'I didn't lie and legit cannot find it. It has a cover on it and I have a red [one]...' ROW-3141 [Received]: 'Why would she make up in detail it having a green light and smoke coming out.' — Olivia reports seeing a device with green light and smoke at Eli's household. Eli is searching for a device with a cover. Olivia has documented asthma concerns (per B-009 context). At this early stage (2023), this is a genuine welfare observation — not yet weaponized. Becomes the basis for the RF-15 Category B vaping/asthma scheme in B-026 (Jun 2025). Note: Eli admits vaping briefly in B-026 (stopped immediately on recognition). This early signal is the precursor.
primary_flags.note: This early observation predates the weaponized B-026 vaping/asthma allegation by 2 years. At B-009 stage: genuine concern. At B-026: RF-15 Category B primary, RF-14 peripheral per ADD-001 compound boundary.

arc_updates.event: No new signals — WATCHING maintained (3 signals)
RF14-S-003: Vaping/smoke device early observation. ARC-RF14-002 first signal — promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING. Genuine safety documentation arc established.
